SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CHIRR_MASTERY_DESC: Ut Chirr, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CHIRR_GRANDMASTERY_DESC: Ut Chirr, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CHIRR_MAID_DESC: Ut Chirr, purga tres res Lunares in uno cursu.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CHIRR_HEADBUTT_DESCRIPTI: Ut Chirr, iacta 20 scarabaeos extra marginem tabulae.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CHIRR_BEASTMASTER_DESCRI: Ut Chirr, iacta socium de rupe, ferro 20 res, deinde <style=cIsHealth>more</style>.
